facebook.caption: POV: you're in Phu Quoc craving something light and you stumble onto Khánh Ly Vegetarian Restaurant. Full vegan meal. Under $10 a person. 407 people have already figured this out. Sit down, order everything, feel zero guilt. 35 Đường Nguyễn Trãi is the address. Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Walked in not knowing what to expect. Plates kept coming. Every single one under $10 total. Khánh Ly Vegetarian Restaurant on Đường Nguyễn Trãi is doing something right. 4.2 stars and 407 reviews back that up.
